name: Insight Synthesizer
description: Generates strategic insights by cross-referencing model outputs, evidence bundles, and ranking patterns. Identifies unique perspectives from top-ranked models, detects evidence-to-response gaps (retrieved but unused citations), and assesses query complexity across multiple dimensions (comparison, mechanism, safety).

provider.organization: Bayer AG — LLM Council Agent Team

skills.name: Cross-Model Unique Insight Detection
skills.description: Identifies information that appears only in the top-ranked model's response, measuring unique term count to quantify distinctive analytical contributions.
examples: Identify unique perspectives in the top-ranked model's response on ATTR-CM mechanisms

skills.name: Evidence-to-Response Gap Analysis
skills.description: Compares retrieved evidence citations against actual references in the chairman's synthesis. Detects unused citations (potential knowledge gaps) and confirms successful integration count.

skills.name: Query Complexity Assessment
skills.description: Multi-dimensional complexity scoring: word count, comparison indicators, mechanism queries, safety focus. Classifies as Simple, Moderate, Complex, Highly Complex, or Expert-Level.
